cases.prompt: 이 서비스 수익 모델 설계하고 가격 정하자

assertions.text: Runs the service diagnosis interview (target B2C/B2B, market, user volume, core value, competition, resources)
Selects a model (freemium / subscription / usage / hybrid) via the repeat-use decision tree
Produces MONETIZATION.md with the chosen model, tier structure, and free-vs-paid boundary

cases.prompt: help me figure out freemium vs subscription pricing strategy for my app

assertions.text: Designs a 4-tier structure (Free / Pro / Team / Enterprise) with acquisition-to-harvest purpose per tier
Decides the free-to-paid boundary along axes like capacity, count, features, seats, support, or speed

cases.prompt: 무료 유료 어떻게 나눌지랑 한국 시장 보정까지 같이 봐줘

assertions.text: Includes Korea-specific adjustments such as Kakao Pay / Naver Pay support and charm pricing (e.g. 9,900)
Flags Korean legal requirements like 전자상거래법 7-day refund and auto-renewal pre-notice
